final:
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input CI,
    output reg SUM,
    output reg COUT
);always @ (A or B or CI) begin
        SUM = A ^ B ^ CI;
        COUT = (A & B) | (B & CI) | (CI & A);
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      SUM = ~A; COUT = ~B;
    end
  end

endmodule
